title: Selene Station: Streaming Cargo Consolidation
strategies: worst-fit priority (w=[0,0,1,0]): stow each canister into the emptiest fitting module, maximizing wasted budget -- reproduces the evaluator's weak reference, ~0.1
first-fit priority (w=[1,0,0,0]): all fitting modules tie, so the lowest-index module wins, reusing earlier gaps without look-ahead
best-fit priority (w=[0,0,-1,0]): stow into the tightest fitting module to close modules densely -- the strongest simple online rule under the fixed streaming simulator

tuned combined priority: blend leftover fraction, current emptiness, and the squared-leftover term to search for a policy that consolidates further on skewed (bimodal / Weibull / heavy-tailed) cost distributions
